listBook.title: Book List
listBook.confirmUpdateTagsContent: About to update tags for all books with tag {tag}.
listBook.confirmUpdateTagsLimit: Since the number exceeds 300, only the first 300 books will be processed.
listBook.confirmUpdateTagsWarning: This operation may take a long time, please be patient.
listBook.confirmBatchUpdateContent: Are you sure you want to set category {category} for all books with tag {tag}? This will update approx. {total} books.
listBook.confirmBatchUpdateContentAuthor: Are you sure you want to set category {category} for all books by {author}? This will update approx. {total} books.
listBook.setCategoryForTagBooks: Set category "{category}" for all books with tag "{tag}"
listBook.setCategoryForAuthorBooks: Set category "{category}" for all books by {author}

opds.kybookDescription: An eBook reader supporting iOS and macOS
opds.moonReaderDescription: A powerful eBook reader for Android
opds.addLibrary: Add a new OPDS library in the reader
opds.startReading: Start browsing and reading your eBooks
opds.moonReaderNote: Since Moon+ Reader does not support cookie login, please configure as follows:
opds.enableGuestAccess: Enable 'Allow arbitrary downloads' (guests do not need to register or log in)

welcome.description: This is a private library. You need to enter a password to access.

activation.successMessage: You have successfully activated your account. Please go to the homepage to browse!

books.title: Book Management
books.description: This table only displays partial fields of books. Click to quickly modify. For complete book information, please click the link to view the book details page.
books.kindleConvertSelectedConfirm: This will convert {count} selected books that have Kindle formats (azw3/mobi) but no EPUB format to EPUB. This may take some time. Continue?
books.kindleConvertAllConfirm: This will scan all books and convert those with Kindle formats (azw3/mobi) but no EPUB format to EPUB. This may take a long time. Continue?
books.updateTitleSortSelectedConfirm: This will update the title sort (pinyin) for {count} selected books. Continue?
books.updateTitleSortAllConfirm: This will update the title sort (pinyin) for all books where title_sort equals title. Continue?
books.clearRareTagsConfirm: This will update tags for books with tags that have less than 3 books. This operation may take some time. Continue?
books.exchangeTypeConfirm: This will exchange the book type of selected books. eBooks will be converted to hardcopy books, and hardcopy books will be converted to eBooks. Books without valid ISBN or with existing eBook formats will be ignored. Please confirm.

reminder.description: You are about to fetch book information from the internet. Please note the following limitations:
reminder.rule1: 1. Please configure the 'Internet Book Information Source' in 'System Settings' and enable the Douban plugin;
reminder.rule2: 2. This operation only updates books without covers or descriptions;
reminder.rule3: 3. Due to limitations of services like Douban, only one book can be updated per second;
reminder.estimate: Estimated runtime is {minutes} minutes. Please do not stop the program during this period.

users.title: User Management
users.reading_range_whitelist: Only allow books in specified categories/tags

imports.title: Import Books
imports.instructions: Please place the books to be imported in the directory { scan_dir }. Supported formats are azw/azw3/epub/mobi/pdf/txt.
imports.note: Note: Do not delete successfully imported records to avoid re-importing the books.
imports.calibre: Additionally, you can use the PC version of Calibre to manage books. However, please note: After using the PC version, you need to restart the Web version for it to take effect.
imports.select_files: Please select the files to be processed (by default, all books will be imported. Existing books will not be re-imported even if selected).
imports.batch_add_dialog_description: Please select a CSV file for batch import. The CSV file must meet the following requirements:
imports.ignored_errors_title: The following directories could not be accessed during scanning and were skipped:
imports.ignored_errors_hint: These directories may have permission issues or other access errors. Please check the directory permissions and scan again.

settings.trash_description: The Calibre Recycle Bin (library/.caltrash) stores deleted book files and automatically purges them 7 days after deletion by default. Files created in the (upload) directory during book upload persist even after the books have been successfully imported into the library.
settings.trash_clear_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to clear the trash bin and upload directory? This action cannot be reverted.
settings.allow_guest_read: Allow guests to read online (no registration or login required)
settings.allow_guest_download: Allow unrestricted downloads (no registration or login required)
settings.allow_guest_push: Allow unrestricted book pushing (no registration or login required)
settings.allow_guest_upload: Allow guests to upload books (no registration or login required, please ensure you understand the risks of enabling this)
settings.allow_guest_register: Allow guests to register accounts via email
settings.allow_new_user_manage_book: Newly registered users are enabled to upload and download by default
settings.allow_new_user_push_book: Newly registered users are enabled to push books to reading devices by default
settings.allow_read_range_setting: Allow setting user's reading range (restricting visible or invisible categories or tags, guests can only see books without categories and tags)
settings.socials_description: Enabled social networks will automatically display buttons on the login page.
settings.select_socials: Select social network accounts to enable
settings.save_hints: Note: Saving will restart the service, and any ongoing background tasks such as importing and updating information will be interrupted!
settings.save_success: Save successful! It may take 5~10 seconds to take effect!
settings.sns_config_message: Please visit the configuration page of {text} here to obtain the key and set the callback URL to {site_url}/auth/complete/{value}.do
settings.auto_fill_meta: Fetch book information from internet services
settings.douban_api_key: Douban plugin API key, available keys are limited, you can find and replace them yourself
settings.douban_max_count: Max results of Douban plugin query
settings.douban_plugin_description: If you need to enable the Douban plugin, please refer to the installation documentation. If it fails, try changing the mirror, such as talebook/douban-api-rs.
settings.category_with_folder: Set category with top folder name
settings.auto_importing: Monitor importing folder and import automatically (only process new books, deleting files has no effect)
settings.update_category_with_folder_rename: After monitoring the import directory, when renaming the first-level directory or moving files to a new directory, use the latest first-level directory name to update the category of the imported books
settings.utf8_directory: Use Chinese Directory Names (UTF8 Encoding, More Aesthetic)
settings.pdf_tile_with_file_name: Use file name as PDF title (useful when the imported PDF metadata title is not the real title, e.g., scanned PDF files)
settings.creader: Candle Reader (Beta Version, Supports Chapter Reviews)
settings.avatar_service: Avatar service available at www.gravatar.com or cravatar.cn
settings.chunk_upload_size: Chunked upload threshold (default 0 means chunked upload is disabled, values greater than 0 will trigger chunked upload for files larger than this size, minimum 20MB per chunk, e.g., 50MB)
settings.autoreload: Automatically restart server after updating configuration
settings.logo_adjustment_description: If you need to adjust the logo, please refer to the installation documentation.
settings.book_tags_description: Configure the preset categories on the 'Groups' page. When adding a book, if the book title or author name appears in the following categories, the corresponding tag will be automatically added.
settings.email_service_description: Required by email registration, sending to kindle.
settings.name: Name
settings.book_barn_description: All information provied by book barn all from internet public information
settings.bookbarn_collection_hour: Request to book barn at hour
settings.enable_receiving_books: Enable receiving books from Book Barn
settings.book2audio_proxy_comment: Able to access EdgeTTS proxy configuration, can be confirmed by visiting https://edge-tts.com.
settings.use_bookbarn_proxy: Use Book Barn Proxy Service (enabled after authorization via WeChat official account)
settings.device_mgt_description: Manage global reading devices available to all users. Users can also configure their own devices in their User Center.
settings.ai_deepseek_api_key_description: Register an account and obtain an API key at https://platform.deepseek.com
settings.default_page_size: Page size in book list (default is 60)
settings.enable_webdav_sync: Enable writable directory in WebDAV for readers (used for reader sync, files are saved under the reader directory)
settings.enable_debug_logging: Enable debug logging (default off, enable to record detailed debug information)
settings.enable_audio_conversion_log: Enable audio conversion logging (default off, enable to record detailed conversion logs)
settings.enable_opds_service: Enable OPDS catalog service (allows readers to access the library via the OPDS protocol)
settings.enable_webdav_service: Enable WebDAV service (allows readers to access the library via the WebDAV protocol)
settings.enable_podcast_service: Enable Podcast catalog service (allows readers to access the library via the Podcast protocol)
settings.stamp_image_hint: Supports PNG format, image dimensions within 480x480 pixels, file size no more than 128KB. Recommended to use PNG images with transparent background for better results.
settings.stamp_image_size_error: Image file size must not exceed 128KB
settings.stamp_image_dimension_error: Image dimensions must not exceed 480x480 pixels

fields.title: Title
fields.ext_link_invalid: Please enter a URL starting with http:// or https://

tags.noData: Please enter a new tag name

book.kindleSenderNote: * Please add this site's email to Kindle sender list:
book.convertToAudioNote: Converting to audiobook may take some time, please be patient.
book.audioGenerated: Audiobook generated successfully, please refresh the page to view
book.coverTooLarge: Cover image must be smaller than 1MB
book.coverTypeInvalid: Only JPEG or PNG images are allowed
book.defaultFailedReason: Internal error, please check the logs
book.noDownloadableFiles: No downloadable file formats available for this book
book.selectMatchingRecord: Please select the most matching record to copy as the book's description
book.saveMetaSuccess: Metadata successfully synced to book file
book.needEpubOrAzw3: EPUB or AZW3 format required to sync metadata
book.separateHint: After separation, the selected format will be removed from the current book and created as a new independent book.
book.needMultipleFormats: Book has only one format, cannot handle the process.
book.selectFormat: Please select a format to process
book.deleteFormatHint: After deletion, the selected format file will be removed from the current book and cannot be recovered. Please proceed with caution.
book.convertSuccessful: Start conversion, please wait a moment to refresh the page
book.shareCardFailed: Failed to generate share card, please try again
book.author: wrote
book.recommendedBooksDesc: Recommended based on tags and authors
book.configDeviceDesc: Please configure reading devices in system settings or User Center first
book.shareToEmailDesc: Enter an email address to send the book file
book.sendToEmailSuccess: Book is being sent to {email}, please check your inbox
book.sendToEmailFailed: Failed to send, please try again later
book.uploadNewFormatDesc: Add a new format file to the current book
book.supportedFormatsUpload: Supported formats: EPUB, MOBI, AZW, AZW3, PDF, TXT
book.selectFileToUpload: Please select a file to upload

reader.queueMessage: Waiting for {queLen} conversions ahead, added to the background queue
reader.parsing: First read, parsing the directory, please wait... {wait}
reader.timeoutMessage: Timeout not completed, you can continue to wait and refresh later

user.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
user.nickname_min_length: Nickname must be at least 2 characters
user.avatar_format_error: Please upload a PNG or JPEG image
user.uploadWarning: Avatar file size must not exceed 2MB and supports jpg/png format.
user.device_mgt_description: Manage your personal reading devices. Only visible to you. Global devices are configured by admins and available to all users.
user.device_save_failed: Failed to save devices, please try again later

history.noRecords: No reading history. Please enjoy exploring the ocean of books~

footer.base_message: This site is built on Calibre, thanks to the power of open source. If you have any questions or suggestions, please visit the project homepage.

appHeader.feedbackScanQrCode: Scan QR code to follow our WeChat account and send us feedback
appHeader.feedbackOrGithub: Or submit an issue on GitHub
appHeader.defaultFooter: This site is built on Calibre, thanks to the power of open source. All resources are collected from the internet. If there is any infringement, please contact us via email.
appHeader.defaultHeader: Welcome! If you like this project, please visit Github and give talebook a Star!
appHeader.aiChatWelcome: Hello! I'm your AI assistant. How can I help you?
appHeader.aiConnectionError: AI connection failed, please check server configuration or login status

message.networkError: Network error, please try again later

sslManager.selectCertificateFile: Please select the certificate file to upload (.crt)
sslManager.selectPrivateKeyFile: Please select the private key file to upload (.key)
sslManager.invalidCertificateFile: Certificate file (.crt) is invalid, content is not in PEM format
sslManager.invalidPrivateKeyFile: Private key file (.key) is invalid, content is not in PEM format

upload.title: Upload Book
upload.warning: Due to server limitations, please do not upload books larger than  {max_size} .
upload.selectFile: Please select an eBook to upload
upload.addPhysicalBookDesc: Please enter the ISBN number of the book to add. The system will automatically fetch book information online:
upload.isbnPlaceholder: Please enter a 13 or 10 digit ISBN number
upload.isbnMinLength: ISBN must be at least 10 digits
upload.isbnInvalidFormat: ISBN can only contain digits, hyphens and X
upload.barcodeRecognitionFailed: Barcode recognition service error, please try again later
upload.noBarcodeFound: No barcode detected, please ensure the image is clear and contains a complete ISBN barcode
upload.uploadFailedDetail: Upload failed, please check if the file is too large or has been deleted!

readingState.wantsHint: Click to add to/remove from want-to-read list

audio.purchaseDescription: Purchase the full version of "{title}" audiobook to unlock all chapters
audio.purchaseFailed: Purchase failed, please try again later
audio.notPurchased: You have not purchased this audio yet, please purchase first
audio.dailyLimitExceeded: You have already downloaded this audio collection today, please try again tomorrow
audio.purchaseHint: Purchase to unlock all chapters and download functionality
audio.downloadFailed: Download failed, please try again later
